Name: Hinson Management Inc.
Outreach Notes: Self-described largest single HOA manager in Upstate SC. PO Box 160207 / 170 Giles Dr, Boiling Springs SC 29316. Fax: (864) 599-9029. One call reaches dozens of Spartanburg County communities. HIGHEST PRIORITY.

Name: Light Property Management Inc.
Outreach Notes: 841 E Main St Suite 4, Spartanburg SC 29302. 25+ confirmed communities including Bennington Farms, Glen Meadows, Gardens at Timm Creek, Glenn Forest, Berry's Pond, Wedgewood Townes, Stone Creek Falls, Reserve at Woodfin Ridge, and many more. One call = 25+ communities.

Name: HOAupstate

Name: Five Forks Plantation

Name: Orchard Farms
Outreach Notes: 3 sections: Arbor Walk, Baker's Garden, Carriage Place. Pool, tennis, basketball, playground, fitness center, volleyball. Active swim team (Gators). Active Nextdoor. Great community for outreach.

Name: Sugar Creek
HOA Board Contact: Separate boards for SC1, SC2, SC3
Outreach Notes: 810 total homes. One of the largest communities in Greer. Construction mid-1970s–1990s. Each HOA has own pool, clubhouse, tennis. Lots 0.4–0.5 acre. Contact all 3 board sections.

Name: Canebrake
Outreach Notes: Pool, tennis, basketball, clubhouse, playground, lake. 302 Saratoga Dr, Greer SC 29650. Active Facebook group. Board accessible via website — warm contact.

Name: Pelham Falls
Outreach Notes: 2 pools, tennis court, walking path along Enoree River. Riverside school district. Active HOA portal. Direct contact available.

Name: River Downs
Outreach Notes: Board contact available. VP: Leslie Blackwell — lablackwell7@gmail.com. Very accessible — go direct to board president.

Name: Woodridge
Outreach Notes: HOA fee $35/month. Private park, playground, covered picnic shelter. Vibrant diverse neighborhood. Price range $115K–$800K. Board accessible via website.
